name: Crawl4AI
description_en: Scrape JavaScript-heavy pages and SPAs, crawl many URLs concurrently, and extract structured data with reusable CSS/JSON schemas—wrapping the Crawl4AI library.
description_zh: 抓取重 JavaScript 的页面与 SPA、并发爬取多个 URL,并用可复用的 CSS/JSON schema 提取结构化数据——封装 Crawl4AI 库。
long_en: Provides schema-generation patterns for LLM-free extraction via the `crwl` CLI and Python SDK, with guidance on when a lighter static fetch suffices.
long_zh: 通过 `crwl` CLI 与 Python SDK 提供免 LLM 抽取的 schema 生成范式,并给出何时用更轻量的静态抓取即可的建议。
sec_note_en: Drives a headless browser to fetch third-party sites; respect target sites' terms and robots policies.
sec_note_zh: 会驱动无头浏览器抓取第三方站点;请遵守目标站点的条款与 robots 规则。
